_comment_after: Restart Alfred after editing. Verify with: openclaw mcp list

gitnexus._comment_command: Two options below — pick A (direct, recommended) or B (via SSH if Alfred not on bee-prod-1)

_option_A_direct._use_if: Alfred runs on the same host as gitnexus (bee-prod-1) OR you've copied the source to E:\

_option_B_ssh_tunnel._use_if: Alfred runs on Barak's Windows PC + gitnexus runs on bee-prod-1 over Tailscale
_option_B_ssh_tunnel._note: Replace the actual mcpServers.gitnexus entry to use SSH

_disabled_tools_with_reason.rename: Can mass-rewrite files when dry_run=false (audit §3.1). Re-enable only if BEE adds confirm gate.
_disabled_tools_with_reason.cypher: Allows arbitrary Cypher queries. Trusted-operator-only — not for autonomous LLM (audit §2.1).
_disabled_tools_with_reason.group_sync: Writes contracts.json. Not needed for BEE single-repo use (audit §2.2).

env._comment: These env vars override defaults. UNDERSTAND_QUICKLY_TOKEN is INTENTIONALLY NOT SET.

gitnexus._comment_timeout: Per-tool-call timeout. Longer than typical (5s) since impact/cypher can be slow on first run.
